nodes.title: Fix ALL 689 Test Failures
nodes.description: Comprehensive fix plan for test failures: 689 failures across 22 test classes. Categories: Database setup, Missing endpoints, Service logic, Handle updates, XRPC proxy. Use scratchpad files in .claude/ to track detailed implementations

nodes.title: Fix PDSAdminServiceTests database schema
nodes.description: PDSAdminServiceTests.m opens empty database without schema. Need to apply migrations in setUp like FeedServiceTests.setupSchema: does. File: Garazyk/Tests/Admin/PDSAdminServiceTests.m lines 15-35

nodes.title: Fix PDSAuthzManagerTests database schema
nodes.description: PDSAuthzManagerTests.m fails with same 'no such table: schema_version' error. Files: Garazyk/Tests/Security/PDSAuthzManagerTests.m

nodes.title: Implement missing XRPC endpoint stubs (48 methods)
nodes.description: 48 endpoints returning 404 in LexiconResolveXrpcTests. Categories: chat.bsky.group.* (20), chat.bsky.convo.* (4), app.bsky.unspecced.* (8), tools.ozone.* (10), com.atproto.admin.* (6). Need to look up lexicon definitions and implement handlers.

nodes.title: Fix FeedServiceTests setup
nodes.description: 205 failures in FeedServiceTests. Need to investigate FeedServiceTests.m setupSchema: and compare to failures. Feed service queries returning issues.

nodes.title: Fix ActorServiceTests setup
nodes.description: 188 failures in ActorServiceTests. Setup schema incomplete or service configuration issues. File: Garazyk/Tests/AppView/ActorServiceTests.m

nodes.title: Fix NotificationServiceTests setup
nodes.description: 62 failures in NotificationServiceTests. File: Garazyk/Tests/AppView/NotificationServiceTests.m

nodes.title: Fix XrpcProxy ozone fallback routing
nodes.description: XrpcProxyTests failing - ozone methods not routing correctly. Files: XrpcProxy.m, OzoneHandler.m. Returns 200 instead of expected routing or 404.

nodes.title: Fix RepoAuthIdentityTests handle update
nodes.description: 20 failures - handle updates returning 400 'Account not found'. Root cause in PDSIdentityService.m or identity handling logic. Files: RepoAuthIdentityTests.m

nodes.title: Fix remaining test failures (MST, CLI, KeyManager)
nodes.description: ~100 failures in MSTCharacterizationTests, PDSCLIAccountCommandTests, PDSCLIRepoCommandTests, KeyManagerCharacterizationTests, KeyManagerSecurityTests. Various root causes.

nodes.title: Design audit fixes - dark mode and accessibility
Add missing chat.bsky.group lexicon JSON files
nodes.description: Root cause: 404s are NOT missing handlers - handlers exist in XrpcChatBskyGroupPack.m. Problem is missing lexicon JSON files in Resources/lexicons/chat/bsky/group/. Need to create 20+ JSON schema files.

nodes.title: Add missing chat.bsky.convo lexicon JSON files
nodes.description: Root cause: Missing lexicon JSON files in Resources/lexicons/chat/bsky/convo/. Need to create 22+ JSON schema files. Handlers exist in XrpcChatBskyConvoPack.m.

nodes.title: Review Objective-C systems and portability practices
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"main","confidence":93,"prompt":"can you review what kinds of systems we are trying to build in each files, ex: we have a custom http and websocket server implementations with middleware and routing, think about best practices for writing such code abstractly then think about more concretely wrt. objective c (portable objc for both native macos and gnustep, shiming non-existent apis in gnustep that native macos frameworks are ok with documentation). remember to track all choices w/ deciduous"}
